chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2750 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on office objections 1 to 3. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 29.08.2025 Mr. Mir Baz Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition and submits that since the SCNS Act has been amended and proviso for bail has also been inserted in the Act, therefore, he will approach the trial Court for grant of bail. The instant petition is disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
